---
name: Documentation Task
about: Request new documentation or improvements to existing project guides.
title: '[DOCS] '
labels: 'documentation, good first issue'
assignees: ''
---

## Documentation Area
Which part of the project documentation needs updating or writing?
- [ ] **README / Main Overview**
- [ ] **Setup / Local Dev Guide**
- [ ] **Data Architecture / Schema Reference**
- [ ] **Pipeline Execution / Makefile Commands**
- [ ] **In-code Docstrings / API Reference**
- [ ] **Other** (please specify)

## Problem / Gap
Describe what is currently missing, outdated, or confusing in the docs. (e.g., "The README does not explain how ClickHouse database initialization runs on container boot").

## Proposed Changes
Outline the new content, guides, diagrams, or updates that should be added.

## Review Criteria
Who should verify these changes? Are there specific validation steps (e.g., testing the setup commands locally on a fresh clone to ensure the instructions work)?
